title: MTR Low Effort British Rail Class 710 & 720
description: Low Effort British Rail Class 710 & 720 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort British Rail Class 710 & 720
British Rail Class 710 & 720, retextured from an M-Train from the base mod.
![train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2a25a37af3a633ce0e60cf12c1739e306204191_0.webp)
## Liveries
### Class 710
- London Overground livery
### Class 720
- Class 720 in Greater Anglia livery
## Features
- The trains
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
